channel.title: plug on Kang's blog
channel.description: Recent content in plug on Kang's blog

item.title: Vim
item.description: tips vim-table-mode key bindings using vim-markdown-toc bullets.vim rnvimr vim-surround vim-expand-region vim-visual-multi vim-rooter any-jump.vim vista.vim fzf.vim undotree vim-gitgutter agit.vim vim-autoformat semshi braceless.vim tcomment_vim antovim vim-easy-align NrrwRgn splitjoin.vim vim-peekaboo coc Note that some of the key bindings is remaped through my own habit. tips vim ‘>’ 符号提供了缩进功能，值得学习。 vim 插件提供的快捷键一般
